project.name: gvt-dev
project.description: The gvt-dev Claude Code plugin: shared skills, agents, hooks, and conventions for Genvid game projects.

commands.validate: claude plugin validate plugin && node --test plugin/skills/audit-conventions/scripts/test/*.test.mjs && node --test plugin/skills/create-adr/scripts/test/*.test.mjs && node plugin/skills/audit-conventions/scripts/audit.mjs
